summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GCSE Question Bank Platform MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend dashboard working correctly with paper creation, PDF upload interface, and stats display.

design_issues.issue: Number input correctly rejects non-numeric values (expected behavior)

passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns healthy status with storage initialized
GET /api/ - Returns API info with correct version
GET /api/stats - Returns all required statistics fields (0 initial state)
POST /api/papers - Successfully creates papers with all required fields
GET /api/papers/{id} - Retrieves specific paper by ID
GET /api/questions?paper_id={id} - Filters questions by paper ID
Error handling - Returns proper 404 for non-existent resources
Paper creation form works with all dropdowns and inputs
Stats display shows correct initial values (0 papers, 0 questions)
Paper selection enables PDF upload zone
PDF upload zone is clickable and properly styled
Form validation works (number inputs reject text)
